description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Deploy to Pypi that triggers on push with any tag. In an ubuntu-latest job, check out the code, set up Python 3.10, install dependencies from requirements.txt and doc/requirements_doc.txt, build documentation, install the package, build a binary wheel and source tarball, and publish to TestPyPI and PyPI using provided secrets. Also, push the documentation to a stable branch on a separate repository.
